text: Hi Vijay, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?
Yes, it's a good time to talk.
XOptimus Smart Charger will help you keep your Li-Ion battery life intact and performance optimal. How can I assist you today?
When I want to increase Indian price, I'm not able to represent you.
I can't honor requests for price increases, especially for certain products like the XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter). How about we discuss ways to optimize your current product instead?
I can find this charger kind of easier at some places and websites.
Hello, you're off the line now. Enjoy your day!
